content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.security.injection_defense
FILE: cosmos/core/security/injection_defense.py (1025 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Injection Defense - 5-layer anti-injection system.

Layers:
  1. Structural  (0.25) - Regex/pattern matching, homoglyphs, invisible chars
  2. Semantic    (0.25) - Embedding similarity against known injection corpus
  3. Behavioral  (0.20) - Entropy, frequency, topic drift, response probing
 

CLASSES:
- ThreatLevel(Enum)
- LayerResult
- SecurityVerdict
- StructuralLayer: Enhanced regex + pattern matching with homoglyph / invisible char detection.
  Methods: async def analyze(self, text: str) -> LayerResult
- SemanticLayer: Embedding similarity against known injection corpus.
  Methods: async def analyze(self, text: str) -> LayerResult
- BehavioralLayer: Entropy analysis, frequency tracking, topic drift, response probing.
  Methods: async def analyze(self, text: str, client_id: str='', session_id: str='') -> LayerResult
- CanaryLayer: Zero-width Unicode canary tokens for output tracking.
  Methods: def inject_canary(self, text: str) -> Tuple[str, str]
  Methods: async def analyze(self, text: str) -> LayerResult
- CollectiveLayer: LLM consensus layer - only triggered when suspicious.
  Methods: async def analyze(self, text: str) -> LayerResult
- InjectionDefense: 5-layer anti-injection defense system for the Cosmos collective.
  Methods: async def analyze(self, input_text: str, client_id: str='', session_id: str='', context: str='') -> 
  Methods: def inject_canary(self, response_text: str) -> Tuple[str, str]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_injection_defense() -> InjectionDefense
